---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Portless.NET
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when [...]")

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

- Would this be a breaking change? 
- Are there examples of this feature in similar tools? (e.g., original Portless, nginx-proxy, Traefik)

## Priority (optional)

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Must have — blocking my workflow
- [ ] Should have — significant improvement
- [ ] Nice to have — minor quality of life
